rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Base64 Encoding

rules.rule_text:
title: Base64 Encoding
id: 027b8851-d448-4a3e-8f2e-698433ba81e3
status: experimental
description: "If you\u2019re looking to detect malicious use of Base64 encoding, consider\
  \ monitoring for the \nexecution of processes like powershell.exe or cmd.exe along\
  \ with command lines containing \nparameters like ToBase64String and FromBase64String.\
  \ The following simple pseudo-analytic \nmight help you find malicious obfuscation.\
  \ Part of the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection \nReport.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/obfuscated-files-information/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1027
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
    - \cmd.exe
    - \powershell.exe
    CommandLine|contains: base64
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
